comment_data.body: how did this file get generated without updating `gen_json_schemas.lua` ?
doing this in module scope is fragile.
comment_data.diff_hunk:
@@ -0,0 +1,59 @@
+---@brief
+---
+--- https://github.com/stylelint/vscode-stylelint/tree/main/packages/language-server
+---
+--- `stylelint-language-server` can be installed via npm `npm install -g @stylelint/language-server`.
+--- ```
+
+local util = require 'lspconfig.util'
+local lsp = vim.lsp
+
+local root_file = {
+  '.stylelintrc',
+  '.stylelintrc.mjs',
+  '.stylelintrc.cjs',
+  '.stylelintrc.js',
+  '.stylelintrc.json',
+  '.stylelintrc.yaml',
+  '.stylelintrc.yml',
+  'stylelint.config.mjs',
+  'stylelint.config.cjs',
+  'stylelint.config.js',
+}
+
+root_file = util.insert_package_json(root_file, 'stylelint')

comment_data.body: wt...I wrote this whole file manuly, I didn't noticed there is script

Notice that there's an existing stylelint config already. It's using an old LS https://github.com/neovim/nvim-lspconfig/blob/master/lsp/stylelint_lsp.lua . 

Probably that config should be replaced instead of adding yet another one.

comment_regular_data.body:
applied default config from https://github.com/stylelint/vscode-stylelint/blob/main/package.json

added `LspStylelintFixAll` user cmd like eslint
did you run the doc generation? https://github.com/neovim/nvim-lspconfig/pull/4351/commits/88bf33e7db3ba5ce7ad6766deefa2b867b42ff86 should not be here.

> did you run the doc generation? [88bf33e](https://github.com/neovim/nvim-lspconfig/commit/88bf33e7db3ba5ce7ad6766deefa2b867b42ff86) should not be here.

no, it's auto generated after git commit push
